mnemonic: 白 (white) + 勺 (ladle). The single most common character in Chinese; the little white ladle that scoops out the link in 'X's Y'.
A single horizontal stroke. One line means one. The simplest character there is.
日 (sun) over 正 (upright/correct). What the sun reveals is true: 'it is so'.
A bird flying up and hitting a ceiling (一). It can NOT get through. Negation.
One stroke ending in a hook, like a checkmark. The action is done: tick, finished.

meaning: at; in; on; to exist; located at
mnemonic: 土 (earth) holding a sprouting form. To exist 'at' a place is to be rooted in the ground.
Two legs mid-stride. A person walking, one of the oldest pictographs.

meaning: to have; there is/are; to exist
mnemonic: A hand (𠂇) over a slab of meat (月). Meat in hand means you 'have' it.
A hand gripping a halberd (戈). 'I' is the self that holds the weapon to defend its ground.
亻 (person) + 也 (also). Another person standing there: 'he', the other one.
辶 (movement) + 文. You step over and point right at it: 'this one, here'.
A person under a peaked roof. The all-purpose counter you reach for to count one of anything.
亻 (person) + 门 (gate). A crowd pouring through the gate; turns 'I/you/he' into 'we/you all/they'.
A line driven straight through the middle of a box (口). Dead center.
Originally a ripe wheat plant. The harvest 'comes' up out of the field and comes to you.

meaning: up; above; on; previous; to go up
mnemonic: A mark sitting above the baseline (一). Above the line: up. Mirror image of 下.
A person (人) throwing both arms wide to show how 'big' it is.

meaning: for; because of / to do; to act as; to be
mnemonic: Originally a hand leading an elephant to work. To do something 'for' a purpose, or to act as.
禾 (grain) + 口 (mouth). Every mouth fed with grain means harmony, and people brought together: 'and'.
囗 (border) around 玉 (jade). A 'country' is jade treasure within guarded borders.
土 (earth) + 也 (also). Earth and yet more earth spreading out: the 'ground'.

meaning: to arrive; to reach; to; until; to go to
mnemonic: 至 (to reach) + 刂 (knife). An arrow reaching the target, sharp point landing: you 'arrive'.

meaning: by means of; in order to; according to; with
mnemonic: A person wielding a tool. 'By means of' one thing you accomplish another.

meaning: to speak; to say; to explain
mnemonic: 讠 (speech) + 兑 (exchange). Words traded out loud: to 'speak'.
日 (sun) + 寸 (measure). Measuring the sun's position is how you tell 'time'.

meaning: to want; to need; must; important; will
mnemonic: 西 (west) + 女 (woman); originally a waist, the body's vital center. What you 'want' / must have.

meaning: then; just; at once; precisely; to approach
mnemonic: 京 (capital) + 尤 (especially). Make for the capital and 'then', right away, it happens.

meaning: to go out; to come out; to produce; to exit
mnemonic: Originally a foot stepping out of a pit; looks like peaks stacked. You climb 'out' and away.

meaning: can; to be able; to meet; meeting; will
mnemonic: 人 (person) over 云 (cloud). People gathering under the clouds: a 'meeting', and being able to.
A mouth (口) granting approval. Permission spoken aloud: 'may', 'can'.
A single flowing form. Tag it on to mean 'also': me too, this as well.
亻 (person) + 尔 (you/that). The person facing me: 'you'.

meaning: correct; right; to face; toward; a pair
mnemonic: 又 (hand) + 寸 (measure). A hand measuring precisely: getting it 'correct', squaring up to face it.

meaning: to be born; life; to grow; raw; student
mnemonic: A sprout pushing up out of the soil (土). New 'life' growing.

meaning: can; to be able to; ability; energy
mnemonic: Originally a picture of a bear, a strong, capable beast. Strength becomes 'ability'.
Originally a drawing of a hanging beard. Now a formal joiner: 'and yet', 'but'.
A swaddled baby with arms out. A 'child', and a core radical.
Mirror of 这 (this): points away to the far city (阝) on the right. 'That one over there'.
彳 (step) + 旦 (dawn) + 寸 (hand). Walk out at dawn and grasp it: you 'get' it.
A formal hook linking two things into relation: 'at', 'in', 'to'.
羊 (sheep) over 目 (eye). Keep your eye on the sheep the whole time: ongoing action.

meaning: down; below; under; next; to go down
mnemonic: A mark below the baseline (一). Below the line: down. Mirror of 上.
A picture of a nose. Chinese speakers point at their own nose to mean 'me': 'self'.
A footprint moving forward; the literary cousin of 的, classical 'of' and 'this'.
Originally a person carrying harvested grain home. One harvest equals one 'year'.
辶 (movement) + 寸 (measure). Stepping across a measured span: to 'pass', or to have done before.

meaning: to send out; to develop; to emit / hair
mnemonic: A hand loosing an arrow: to 'send out', launch, develop. (As 'fà': hair.)

meaning: after; behind; back; rear; later; queen
mnemonic: A figure with a mouth issuing orders from the 'rear', and what comes 'after' the front.

meaning: to do; to make; to work; to write; a work
mnemonic: 亻 (person) + 乍 (suddenly/make). A person making something: to 'do', to produce a work.
田 (field) + 土 (earth). Where fields and soil sit is the 'village', and 'inside' a place.

meaning: to use; to employ; expense; usefulness
mnemonic: Originally a bucket or fence-panel, a tool put to work. To 'use' something.

meaning: way; path; road; principle; truth; to say
mnemonic: 辶 (movement) + 首 (head). Where your head leads as you walk: your 'way', the path.

meaning: to walk; OK; to travel / a row; profession
mnemonic: A picture of a crossroads. People moving through it: to 'walk', to be OK; as 'háng', a row or trade.
户 (door) + 斤 (axe). A workshop, a 'place' where work is done; also nominalizes verbs (所说 = what is said).
Dog-meat (肰) over fire (灬); originally 'to burn'. Now 'so', 'thus', and the -ly tail (突然 suddenly).
宀 (roof) over 豕 (pig). A house with a pig inside is wealth: a 'home', a family.

meaning: kind; type; seed; species / to plant
mnemonic: 禾 (grain) + 中 (center). The seed at the center of the grain: a 'kind' / type, or to 'plant'.
A hand holding a brush to record events. A 'matter' or affair to deal with.

meaning: to become; to succeed; to complete; one tenth
mnemonic: 戈 (halberd) marking a task finished. The job is done: you 'succeed', it 'becomes'.
Originally a plough or a banner on a pole. A 'direction', a 'square', a 'method'.
夕 (evening) + 夕 (evening). One evening piled on another: 'many', more and more.

meaning: to pass through; classic; scripture; channel
mnemonic: 纟 (silk) + 巠 (underground stream). The warp threads running the length of cloth: what runs 'through', a classic.
A small curling tail. Tacks onto question words: 什么 (what), 怎么 (how), 那么 (so).

meaning: to go; to leave; to remove; past; last
mnemonic: 土 (earth) + 厶 (private). Leaving your own plot of land to 'go' elsewhere.
氵 (water) + 去 (go). Water finds its level everywhere it goes: a fair 'law', a method.
A child (子) under a roof, hands above passing down knowledge. A child 'learning'.

meaning: as; like; if; according to; such as
mnemonic: 女 (woman) + 口 (mouth). Following spoken instructions exactly: doing 'as' told, 'like' so.
者 (those) + 阝 (city). Everyone in the city together: 'all' of them.
An enclosure with 口 (mouth) inside: many mouths under one roof speaking as one: the 'same', together.

meaning: to appear; present; now; current; cash
mnemonic: 王/玉 (jade) + 见 (to see). Jade polished until its shine 'appears': the here and 'now'.

meaning: to be; to serve as; when; ought / to pawn; suitable
mnemonic: Originally 'to match, to equal'. To stand in a role: to 'serve as', and 'at the time when'.

meaning: not; have not; without; (negative for verbs)
mnemonic: 氵 (water) + 殳 (hand-tool). A hand vanishing under water: 'have not', gone, without.

meaning: to move; to act; movement; to stir
mnemonic: 云 (cloud) + 力 (force). Force applied makes things 'move'.
A pictograph of a face with the eye inside the outline. The 'face', and by extension any surface or side.

meaning: to rise; to get up; to start; to begin
mnemonic: 走 (to run) + 己 (self). You get yourself moving: to 'rise', stand up, begin.

meaning: to look; to watch; to read; to see; to regard
mnemonic: 手 (hand) over 目 (eye). A hand shading the eye to 'look' into the distance.

meaning: to set; to fix; to decide; to settle; surely
mnemonic: 宀 (roof) + 正 (upright). Everything set right under one roof: 'fixed', settled, decided.
一 (the highest line) over 大 (a big person). What's above even a giant: the 'sky', a 'day'.

meaning: to divide; minute; point; (unit) / part; portion
mnemonic: 八 (split apart) over 刀 (knife). A knife cutting something in two: to 'divide', a portion.

meaning: still; also; even; yet / to return; to repay
mnemonic: 辶 (movement) + 不 (not). Movement not yet finished: 'still' going; or to walk something back, 'return'.

meaning: to advance; to enter; to come/go in
mnemonic: 辶 (movement) + 井 (well). Walking forward toward the well: to 'advance', to enter.

meaning: good; well; very / to like, be fond of
mnemonic: 女 (woman) + 子 (child). A mother with her child: the picture of 'good', everything well.
Three tiny strokes, a sliver splitting into specks. 'Small', little bits.
咅 (phonetic) + 阝 (city/region). A district of the city: a 'section', a department.

meaning: his; her; its; their; that; such
mnemonic: Originally a picture of a winnowing basket, borrowed for the pronoun 'its/their/that'.
此 (this) + 二 (two). This and that, a couple here and there: 'some', a few.

meaning: to own; host; master; lord; main; primary
mnemonic: A flame steady on a lampstand. The fixed point everything centers on: the 'master', the main one.
木 (tree) + 羊 (sheep). A wooden model in a 'shape' / kind you can point to: 'this manner'.

meaning: reason; logic; to manage; inner principle
mnemonic: 王/玉 (jade) + 里 (inner lines). The natural grain running through jade: its inner 'logic', the reason.
A pictograph of a heart with its chambers. The 'heart', and the seat of the mind.
女 (woman) + 也 (also). The female counterpart to 他: 'she'.

meaning: root; origin; basis; this; (measure word for books)
mnemonic: 木 (tree) with a mark at the 'base' of the trunk. The 'root', the origin, the source.

meaning: before; in front; ago; former; earlier
mnemonic: A foot moving forward over a boat, with 刂 (knife) cutting ahead. What lies 'in front', 'before'.

meaning: to open; to start; to turn on; to operate
mnemonic: Two hands (廾) lifting the bar off a gate. Throw the doors 'open', start things up.

meaning: but; yet; however; only; merely; still
mnemonic: 亻 (person) + 旦 (dawn). A person at daybreak, one thing ending and another starting: 'but', however.
囗 (enclosure) + 大 (big). A person lying on a mat, the underlying 'cause' or basis of things.
口 (mouth) + 八 (divide). A mouth narrowing it down to 'only' this; or counting one animal.

meaning: from; to follow; since; ever (with neg.)
mnemonic: 人 (person) behind 人 (person). One walking behind another, following: 'from', to follow.

meaning: to think; to want; to miss; to suppose
mnemonic: 相 (mutual/look) over 心 (heart). Looking inward with the heart: to 'think', to long for.

meaning: real; true; honest; solid; fruit; actually
mnemonic: 宀 (roof) over a full granary. A household with real stores inside: 'solid', true, substantial.
A circle with a line inside, the 'sun'; by extension a 'day'.
冖 (cover) over 车 (chariot). Chariots massed under one banner: an 'army'.
Suffix turning a verb into the person who does it: 学者 (scholar), 作者 (author).
音 (sound) over 心 (heart). The sound of the heart: your 'meaning', what you intend.
Originally a dancer with streamers, borrowed for 'nothing'. Empty hands: 'without'.
A picture of a flexed arm or a plough. Muscle and effort: 'strength', force.
宀 (roof) + 匕. Once meant 'snake'; now the neutral pronoun 'it'.

meaning: and; with; to give; together with
mnemonic: Two hands passing something across: 'with', 'and', to give.

meaning: long; length / to grow; chief; elder
mnemonic: A picture of long flowing hair on an old person: 'long', and by extension to grow / elder.
扌 (hand) + 巴. A hand grasping the handle: to 'hold'; also marks the object you act on.
木 (wood) + 几 (small table). A wooden contraption: a 'machine', a device.
A vertical crossing a horizontal, a full grid: 'ten', a complete set.
Originally an eye pierced (a subjugated person); now 'the people', the citizenry.
竹 (bamboo) + 弟 (younger brother). Bamboo joints in sequence: marks order, 第一 = first.
八 (divide) over 厶 (private). Splitting apart the private: making it 'public', shared.
止 (foot) + 匕 (person). Where a person halts and stands: right 'here', 'this'.
Like 己 (self) but sealed off at the top: the thing is closed, done, 'already' finished.
A picture of a carpenter's square or rammer, a tool of labor: 'work', craft.

meaning: to make; to cause; to use; envoy
mnemonic: 亻 (person) + 吏 (official). An official sent to 'make' things happen: to cause, to dispatch.
忄 (heart) + 青 (blue/pure). Pure feeling welling from the heart: 'emotion'.
日 (sun) + 月 (moon). Sun and moon together, the two brightest things: 'bright', clear.
忄 (heart) + 生 (to be born). What the heart is born with: your inborn 'nature'.
矢 (arrow) + 口 (mouth). Words flying straight and true like arrows: to 'know', to state with certainty.
入 (enter) over 王/玉 (jade). Flawless jade brought in, perfect and 'whole', complete.
Three stacked horizontal lines: 'three'.
A picture of a right hand. The hand that does it once more: 'again', also.

meaning: to close; pass; to concern; to shut off
mnemonic: A gate with a bar across it. Drop the bar to 'close' the pass; what passes 'concerns' you.

meaning: dot; point; o'clock; a bit; to order
mnemonic: 占 (occupy) over 灬 (fire). Tiny sparks of fire: a 'dot', a point, an o'clock mark.
一 (a line/goal) + 止 (foot). A foot stopping squarely on the line: 'upright', correct.
Originally a notched board for hanging bells. Now one's trade, 'business', occupation.
夕 (evening) + 卜 (divination). Reading omens at dusk, away from home: 'outside', external.
爿 (bed/table) + 月 (meat) + 寸 (hand). A hand offering meat at the altar: about to act, 'will'; as 'jiàng', a general.

meaning: two; both; a few; (unit of weight: tael)
mnemonic: A balance with two equal pans hanging: 'two', a pair, both.
A picture of a tall tower or gate-building: 'high', tall.
门 (gate) + 日 (sun). Sunlight slipping through the gate's crack: the 'space between'.

meaning: from; by; due to; cause; to follow
mnemonic: A field (田) with a shoot pushing out the top: where things come 'from', the cause.
门 (gate) + 口 (mouth). A mouth at the gate calling in: to 'ask'.
彳 (step) + 艮 (stubborn). Going to an extreme degree: 'very', a lot.
冒 (to risk) over 取 (to seize). Grabbing the top prize: the 'most', the -est.
A person carrying a heavy load on their back: 'heavy', weighty; as 'chóng', to repeat / a layer.

meaning: and; moreover; (not) at all; to merge
mnemonic: Two figures standing side by side: to combine, 'and'; also intensifies a negative.
牜 (ox) + 勿 (do not). Cattle, the most valued possession: 'things', goods, matter.
A palm with five fingers spread: the 'hand'.

meaning: ought; should / to answer; to respond
mnemonic: 广 (shelter) + 心 (heart, in older form). What the heart says you 'ought' to do; to respond.
占 (occupy) + 戈 (halberd). Seizing ground with weapons: 'war', to fight.
A house with a window (口) facing a direction: 'towards', to face.
Simplified from 頭. The topmost part of the body: the 'head', the top.
Crossed lines, originally tattoo patterns: marks and 'writing', culture.
亻 (person) + 本 (root/base). A person's root and frame: the 'body', the form.
正 (upright) + 攵 (action). Acting to set things upright: 'government', politics.
羊 (sheep) over 大 (big). A big fine sheep, a feast for the eyes: 'beautiful'.
木 (tree) + 目 (eye). An eye examining a tree, two things facing: 'mutual'; as 'xiàng', appearance.

meaning: to see; to meet; to appear
mnemonic: An eye (目) on legs (儿). Eyes that move out to look: to 'see', to meet.
衤 (clothing) + 皮 (skin). A cloth covering you like skin: a 'quilt'; also marks the passive 'by'.
禾 (grain) + 刂 (knife). A sharp blade reaping grain, a good return: 'profit', advantage.
亻 (person) + 十 (ten). A squad of ten; now mainly the question word 什么 (what).
Two horizontal lines: 'two'.

meaning: rank; grade; equal; to wait; et cetera
mnemonic: 竹 (bamboo) + 寺 (temple). Bamboo slips sorted by 'rank'; sorting takes time, so also 'to wait'.

meaning: to produce; product; to give birth; estate
mnemonic: 立 (to stand) over 厂 (cliff/factory). Bringing something forth to stand on its own: to 'produce'.
戈 (halberd) guarding a border (囗) and land (一). One choice 'or' another to defend.
立 (stand) + 木 (tree) + 斤 (axe). Freshly axed wood standing ready: 'new', fresh.
A coiled cord, borrowed for 'self'. The thread that is your own.

meaning: to make; system; to control; to limit
mnemonic: A branch trimmed by a knife (刂) to shape: to 'make', to control, a system.

meaning: body; torso; life; (measure word for clothes)
mnemonic: A picture of a pregnant belly in profile: the 'body', the torso.
A tree (木) with round fruit (田) on top: 'fruit', and by extension a 'result'.
力 (strength) + 口 (mouth). Putting muscle and voice behind something: to 'add', to increase.
A bird settling in its nest at sundown, when the sun is in the 'west'.
其 (basket) + 斤 (axe). Mostly phonetic now, used in transliterations like 斯坦 (-stan).
A crescent moon: 'moon', and the lunar 'month'.
讠 (speech) + 舌 (tongue). The tongue working with speech: 'words', talk.

meaning: to join; to fit; to close; to combine
mnemonic: A lid (亼) fitting over a vessel (口): to 'join', to close, to fit together.

meaning: to return; to circle; (a time); to answer
mnemonic: A spiral within a spiral: to circle round and 'return'.
牜 (ox) + 寺 (temple). A prize bull set aside for temple sacrifice: 'special', singled out.

meaning: to replace; generation; era; on behalf of
mnemonic: 亻 (person) + 弋 (stake). One person standing in for another: to 'replace'; a 'generation'.
入 (enter) inside an enclosure (冂): what is 'within', the inside.
亻 (person) + 言 (words). A person true to their word: 'trust', to believe; also a 'letter'.
毛 (fur) + 衣 (clothing). The furry outer coat, the 'surface'; to show outwardly; a 'table'.
亻 (upright person) + 匕 (inverted person). One form flipping into another: to 'change', transform.
A bent figure with long hair leaning on a stick: 'old', aged.
纟 (silk) + 合 (join). Handing over silk thread to join one to another: to 'give'.
Three tens (十) joined, thirty years, one 'generation'; by extension the 'world', an age.
亻 (person) + 立 (to stand). Where a person stands in rank: a 'position', a seat.
冫 (ice) + 欠 (to yawn). Hesitating, taking turns: an 'occasion', the next in order.
广 (shelter) + 又 (hand). A hand measuring under a roof: a 'degree', an extent.
A picture of a two-leaf swinging door: a 'gate', a door.

meaning: to appoint; office; duty; to allow
mnemonic: 亻 (person) + 壬 (to carry). Loading a duty onto a person: to 'appoint', a responsibility.
尚 (esteem) + 巾 (cloth). The everyday cloth you wear all the time: 'often', constant, ordinary.

meaning: first; before; prior; early; in advance
mnemonic: A foot (止) striding ahead of a person (儿): going 'first', before.
氵 (water) + 每 (every). Every river's water gathering into one vast body: the 'sea'.

meaning: to go through; to connect; to communicate
mnemonic: 辶 (movement) + 甬 (path). Moving freely along an open path: to 'go through', connect.
孝 (filial) + 攵 (to tap). Tapping a child to instruct them: to 'teach'.
A child with an open fontanelle on top: a 'child', a son; also the -r suffix.
厂 (cliff) + 泉 (spring). A spring at the foot of a cliff: the 'source', the origin.
Simplified from 東: the sun (日) rising behind a tree, the direction of dawn: 'east'.
Simplified from 聲, a chime struck and heard by the ear: 'sound', voice.

meaning: to lift; to carry; to mention; to raise
mnemonic: 扌 (hand) + 是 (is). A hand raising something up: to 'lift', to bring up / mention.

meaning: to stand; to set up; upright; immediately
mnemonic: A person standing on the ground (一), arms out: to 'stand', upright.

meaning: to reach; and; up to; in time for
mnemonic: A hand (又) reaching out to grab a person from behind: to 'reach', to catch up; 'and'.

meaning: to compare; ratio; than; to gesture
mnemonic: Two people standing side by side, matched up: to 'compare', a ratio.
口 (mouth) over 贝 (shell/money). A mouth to feed on the payroll: a 'member', an employee.

meaning: to untie; to solve; to explain; to divide
mnemonic: 角 (horn) + 刀 (knife) + 牛 (ox). Cutting an ox apart by the horns: to 'divide', to solve, to explain.
A central current with droplets on each side: flowing 'water'.
夕 (evening) + 口 (mouth). In the dark you call out your 'name' so others know you.
Originally a vessel filled to the brim, nothing faked: 'true', genuine, real.

meaning: to discuss; theory; to talk about; treatise
mnemonic: 讠 (speech) + 仑 (order). Putting words in logical order: to 'discuss', a 'theory'.

meaning: to handle; to dwell / a place; office
mnemonic: A figure stopping at a stool: a 'place' to settle; as 'chǔ', to dwell, to handle.

meaning: to walk; to go; to leave; to move
mnemonic: A swinging-armed figure (土) over a foot (止): a person striding, to 'walk'.
Simplified from 義 (sheep over 我). The right and proper thing: 'righteousness', meaning.
夂 (foot arriving) + 口 (mouth). Each person arriving in turn: 'each', every.
An arrowhead or a root pushing inward: to 'enter', to go in.

meaning: how many; a few / small table
mnemonic: A small low table or stool; borrowed for 'how many', a few.
A picture of an open mouth: 'mouth', an opening.

meaning: to recognize; to know; to admit
mnemonic: 讠 (speech) + 人 (person). Speaking up to acknowledge someone: to 'recognize', to admit.

meaning: (measure word for long thin things); strip; item
mnemonic: 夂 + 木 (wood). A long slender twig: the counter for long thin things, a 'strip'.

meaning: flat; level; even; calm; peaceful; to tie
mnemonic: A balance beam hanging level: 'flat', even, calm.
A hand tying up silk threads: to 'tie', a 'connection', a system.

meaning: air; gas; breath; anger; vital energy (qi)
mnemonic: Wisps of vapor rising: 'air', breath, the life-force qi.
是 (is) + 页 (head/page). The heading at the top of a page: a 'topic', a question.

meaning: to live; alive; living; work; lively
mnemonic: 氵 (water) + 舌 (tongue). A tongue wet with water, still moving: 'alive', to live.
Literary 'you'; survives mainly in names and 尔后 (thereafter), 偶尔 (occasionally).

meaning: more; even more / to change; night-watch
mnemonic: A hand striking to renew: to 'change' (gēng); by extension 'even more' (gèng).

meaning: to separate; other; don't; to distinguish
mnemonic: A knife (刂) cutting bone apart: to 'separate', distinguish; hence 'other', and 'don't'.

meaning: to hit; to strike; to play; to make; (from)
mnemonic: 扌 (hand) + 丁 (nail). A hand driving a nail: to 'hit', to strike; a hugely versatile verb.
A kneeling figure with hands folded: 'woman', female. A core radical.

meaning: to change; to transform; to become different
mnemonic: Simplified from 變. Things twisting into a new state: to 'change', transform.
Originally four lines; now an enclosure with split legs inside: 'four'.
礻 (altar) + 申 (to state/lightning). The power revealed at the altar: a 'god', a spirit.
Gathering many threads into one knot at the heart: 'total', overall, always.
亻 (person) + 可 (can). A person shouldering a load and asking: 'what?', 'why?'.
Simplified from 電: rain (雨) with a lightning streak below. Lightning: 'electricity'.
婁 (bundle) + 攵 (action). Tallying a bundle by tapping: a 'number'; to count.

meaning: peace; calm; safe; quiet; to pacify
mnemonic: 宀 (roof) over 女 (woman). A woman safe at home under a roof: 'peace', calm, safety.
小 (small) with a stroke taken away, smaller still: 'few', little; as 'shào', young.

meaning: to report; newspaper; to repay; revenge
mnemonic: 扌 (hand) + 卩 + 又. A hand delivering judgment/news: to 'report', a 'newspaper'.

meaning: talent; ability; only then; just now
mnemonic: A sprout just breaking the soil, raw potential: 'talent'; also 'only just', not until.

meaning: knot; to tie; to conclude / to bear (fruit)
mnemonic: 纟 (silk) + 吉 (lucky). Tying silk into a 'knot' to bind and conclude.

meaning: to turn over; anti-; opposite; to rebel
mnemonic: 厂 (cliff) + 又 (hand). A hand flipping something over: to 'turn over', the opposite, anti-.

meaning: to receive; to bear; to endure; (passive)
mnemonic: A hand passing down (爫) and a hand receiving (又) across a boat: to 'receive', to bear.
A picture of an eye stood upright: 'eye'; by extension an 'item' on a list.
大 (big) with an extra dot, bigger than big: 'too much', the greatest, extremely.
A bag or vessel measured against a sundial: a 'quantity'; as 'liáng', to measure.
A stack piled up one more time: 'again', once more.

meaning: to feel; to move; to sense; emotion
mnemonic: 咸 (all) + 心 (heart). Something striking the whole heart: to 'feel', to be moved.

meaning: to build; to establish; to construct
mnemonic: 聿 (brush) + 廴 (to stride). Laying out plans and pacing the ground: to 'build', establish.

meaning: affair; business; matter; must; to be sure to
mnemonic: Simplified from 務. Putting your strength to a task: an 'affair', business; one 'must'.

meaning: to do; to make; to produce
mnemonic: 亻 (person) + 故 (reason). A person acting for a reason: to 'do', to make.

meaning: to connect; to receive; to join; to meet
mnemonic: 扌 (hand) + 妾 (handmaid). A hand reaching out to take hold: to 'connect', to receive.
A handle marked down the middle, fixed and sure: 'must', certainly.

meaning: open space; field; site; (measure for events)
mnemonic: 土 (earth) + 昜 (sunlight). A sunlit clearing of ground: an open 'field', a venue.
亻 (person) + 牛 (ox). Counting things one by one: the measure word for 'items'.

meaning: to calculate; to count; plan; scheme; gauge
mnemonic: 讠 (speech) + 十 (ten). Counting aloud up to ten: to 'calculate', a 'plan'.

meaning: to manage; tube; pipe; to be in charge of
mnemonic: 竹 (bamboo) + 官 (official). A hollow bamboo 'tube'; an official who 'manages'.

meaning: period; phase; to hope; (issue of); term
mnemonic: 其 (basket/phonetic) + 月 (moon). Counting moons toward a set time: a 'period', a term.
A sign hung over a trading post: the 'market', and by extension the 'city'.
十 (ten) + 目 (eye) + 乚. Ten eyes sighting a perfectly 'straight' line.
彳 (step) + 直 (straight) + 心 (heart). Walking a straight path with an upright heart: 'virtue'.

meaning: resources; capital; to provide; money; fee
mnemonic: 次 (order) + 贝 (money). Money set in order for use: 'capital', resources, funds.
亼 (assemble) + 口 (mouth) + 卩 (seal). An order issued from on high: a 'command'; one's 'fate'.
Three peaks rising side by side: a 'mountain'.
Nuggets buried under a roof in the earth: 'gold', metal, money.
扌 (hand) + 旨 (purpose). The hand's part that points to your purpose: a 'finger', to point.

meaning: gram; to overcome; to subdue; to restrain
mnemonic: A figure bearing a heavy helmet, holding firm: to 'overcome'; also 'gram' (phonetic).
讠 (speech) + 午 (noon). A spoken word of consent: to 'allow', to permit.

meaning: to unite; to unify; whole; system; all
mnemonic: 纟 (silk) + 充 (fill). Gathering loose threads into one cord: to 'unify', a system.
A container (匚) holding divided lots (品-like): a partitioned 'area', a district.

meaning: to protect; to guarantee; to keep; to defend
mnemonic: 亻 (person) + 呆 (a child). A person carrying a child safe: to 'protect', to guard.

meaning: to arrive; until; to; most; utmost
mnemonic: An arrow striking the ground at the end of its flight: to 'arrive', up 'to', until.
阝 (mound) + 人 (person). People lined up along a slope: a 'team', a squad.

meaning: form; shape; to appear; to look
mnemonic: 开 (level) + 彡 (decorative strokes). Outlines drawn out: a 'form', a shape.

meaning: society; group; agency; (god of the soil)
mnemonic: 礻 (altar) + 土 (earth). An altar to the earth-god where people gather: a 'society', a group.

meaning: convenient; then; to relieve oneself / cheap
mnemonic: 亻 (person) + 更 (change). A person changing things to make them easy: 'convenient'.

meaning: empty; sky; air; in vain / free time; gap
mnemonic: 穴 (cave) + 工 (work). A hollowed-out cave: 'empty'; the open 'sky'; as 'kòng', free time.
冫 (water) + 夬 (to break open). Water bursting a dam, no turning back: to 'decide'.

meaning: to govern; to manage; to cure; to control
mnemonic: 氵 (water) + 台 (platform). Controlling the flood waters: to 'govern', to manage, to cure.

meaning: to unfold; to spread out; to exhibit; to develop
mnemonic: 尸 (body) over layered cloth. Rolling something out flat to show it: to 'unfold', exhibit.
A galloping horse with mane and four legs (simplified): a 'horse'.
禾 (grain) + 斗 (measure). Sorting grain by measure into categories: a 'branch', a discipline.

meaning: to manage; company; to take charge of
mnemonic: A hand issuing orders by mouth (口): to 'manage'; a 'company' (公司).
Two lines with a crossed X between, an abstract tally for 'five'.
其 (basket) + 土 (earth). Packed earth laid as groundwork: a 'foundation', a base.

meaning: eye; small hole; key point; (measure word)
mnemonic: 目 (eye) + 艮 (stubborn/stare). The organ that fixes its gaze: the 'eye'.
Simplified from 書, a hand holding a brush over a vessel: writing, hence a 'book'.
Two wings spreading in opposite directions: things going contrary, 'not', wrong.
贝 (vessel) + 刂 (knife). A law inscribed with a knife on a bronze vessel: a 'rule', standard.

meaning: to listen; to hear; to obey
mnemonic: 口 (mouth/ear-side) + 斤 (axe, phonetic). Turning the ear to catch sound: to 'listen'.

meaning: white; clear; plain; blank; in vain
mnemonic: A grain of rice or the sun's first ray: 'white', bright, plain.

meaning: but; yet; however; to step back; to decline
mnemonic: 去 (go) + 卩 (seal). Turning and stepping back: 'yet', however, to retreat.
田 (field) + 介 (to divide). The dividing line between fields: a 'boundary', a scope.

meaning: to reach; to attain; to express; to arrive
mnemonic: 辶 (movement) + 大 (big). Striding all the way through: to 'reach', to attain.

meaning: light; ray; bright; only; used up; glory
mnemonic: A person (儿) with fire (火) above their head: a torch-bearer giving 'light'.

meaning: to release; to let go; to put; to set free
mnemonic: 方 (direction) + 攵 (action). Sending something off in a direction: to 'release', to put.
弓 (bow) + 虫. A drawn bow with great tension: 'strong', powerful.

meaning: namely; that is; right away; to approach
mnemonic: 皀 (food vessel) + 卩 (kneeling person). Sitting right down to the meal: 'at once', namely.

meaning: to resemble; image; portrait; to seem; like
mnemonic: 亻 (person) + 象 (elephant). A likeness of a person or thing: an 'image', to resemble.
Originally a bird (隹) caught in clay; hard to free: 'difficult'; as 'nàn', a disaster.

meaning: moreover; further; for the time being
mnemonic: A stack of offerings piled high: adding 'moreover', and further.
Simplified from 權. The weight on a steelyard that sets the balance: 'authority', power.
田 (field/brain) + 心 (heart). The mind and heart working a field of thought: to 'think'.
Three levels, heaven-earth-man, joined by one vertical: the 'king' who unites them.

meaning: elephant; shape; image; to imitate; symbol
mnemonic: A pictograph of an elephant with its trunk and tusks: an 'elephant'; hence an 'image', a symbol.

meaning: to finish; to complete; whole; entire
mnemonic: 宀 (roof) + 元 (origin/whole). The house fully built and roofed: 'finished', complete.

meaning: to set up; to establish; to arrange; to found
mnemonic: 讠 (speech) + 殳 (tool). Giving the word to put things in place: to 'set up', establish.
工 (work) + 弋 (standard). A worked-out standard to follow: a 'form', a pattern.
A person bending over another, a flush of feeling on the face: 'color', complexion.
足 (foot) + 各 (each). Each footstep laying out the way: a 'road', a path.

meaning: to remember; to record; mark; note
mnemonic: 讠 (speech) + 己 (self). Setting your own words down: to 'record', to remember.
Originally a bell or rack facing a warm direction: 'south'.
Three mouths (口) stacked: many items judged and graded: 'goods', quality, rank.

meaning: to live; to dwell; to reside; to stop
mnemonic: 亻 (person) + 主 (master). A person settled as master of a place: to 'live', to dwell.

meaning: to tell; to inform; to announce; to sue
mnemonic: 牛 (ox) + 口 (mouth). Calling out an offering announcement: to 'tell', to inform.

meaning: kind; type; class; category; to resemble
mnemonic: 米 (rice) + 大 (big), simplified. Sorting grains by sort: a 'kind', a category.

meaning: to seek; to request; to demand; to beg
mnemonic: Originally a fur garment clutched tight; now to clutch at, to 'seek', to beg for.

meaning: according to; to rely on; to seize; to occupy
mnemonic: 扌 (hand) + 居 (to dwell). A hand holding firm ground: to 'rely on', according to; to seize.
禾 (grain) + 呈 (to present). Measuring out grain by fixed steps: a 'procedure', a journey.
Two people standing back to back, turned from the warm south: facing 'north'.
辶 (movement) + 力. Walking out to the rim: the 'edge', the border, a side.

meaning: to die; dead; fixed; rigid; impassable
mnemonic: 歹 (bones) + 匕 (person). A person collapsed beside bare bones: to 'die', dead.

meaning: (measure word for flat things); to open; (surname)
mnemonic: 弓 (bow) + 长 (long). Drawing a bow wide open: to 'open up'; the counter for flat sheets.

meaning: should; ought to; that (aforementioned); to owe
mnemonic: 讠 (speech) + 亥. The word for what one 'should' do; 'the above-mentioned'.

meaning: to hand over; to intersect; to make (friends); to pay
mnemonic: A person with legs crossed: things crossing and meeting: to 'intersect', to hand over.
夫 (man) + 见 (to see). A man sighting along a compass: a 'rule', a standard.
Simplified from 萬 (a scorpion swarm, countless). 'Ten thousand', a vast number.

meaning: to take; to get; to choose; to fetch
mnemonic: 耳 (ear) + 又 (hand). A hand seizing an ear (war trophy): to 'take', to seize.

meaning: to pull; to drag; to play (strings); to chat
mnemonic: 扌 (hand) + 立 (stand). A hand hauling something upright: to 'pull', to drag.
木 (wood) + 各 (each). A wooden lattice of equal squares: a 'grid', a frame, a standard.

meaning: to hope; to gaze; to look toward; to visit
mnemonic: A figure on tiptoe (壬) gazing at the moon (月): to 'gaze', to 'hope' for.

meaning: to feel; to sense; aware / sleep; a nap
mnemonic: Simplified from 覺. Coming to perceive (见): to 'feel', to become aware; as 'jiào', sleep.
木 (wood) with a dot, a sapling tended by craft: a 'technique', a skill, an art.

meaning: neck; collar; to lead; to receive; to comprehend
mnemonic: 令 (command) + 页 (head). The neck that carries the head and gives orders: to 'lead', a 'collar'.
Two hands lifting one object together: doing it 'together', in 'common'.
石 (stone) + 角 (horn). As hard and fixed as horn on stone: 'firm', certain, true.

meaning: to pass on; to spread / a biography
mnemonic: 亻 (person) + 专 (specialized). Passing word from person to person: to 'spread'; a 'biography'.
A banner over a gathering of troops, the leader who instructs: a 'teacher', a master.

meaning: to observe; to watch; view / Taoist temple
mnemonic: Simplified from 觀. 见 (to see) with 又. Fixing the eyes on something: to 'observe', a 'view'.
氵 (water) + 青 (blue-green). Clean blue water you can see through: 'clear', pure.
亼 (to gather) over a mark: the present moment gathered to a point: 'now', today.

meaning: close; eager; definitely / to cut; to slice
mnemonic: 七 (seven) + 刀 (knife). A knife pressed right up to cut: to 'cut'; as 'qiè', close, urgent.
阝 (mound/wall) + 完 (complete). A walled enclosure: a 'courtyard', an institution.

meaning: to let; to allow; to yield; to make (someone do)
mnemonic: 讠 (speech) + 上 (up). Speaking to give way: to 'let', to yield, to allow.
讠 (speech) + 只/戠. Words you can name on sight: to 'know', 'knowledge'.

meaning: to wait; time; season; condition; to await
mnemonic: 亻 (person) + 㠯 + 矢 (arrow). A person watching and waiting for the signal: to 'wait'; a 'time'.

meaning: belt; band; zone; to carry; to lead; to bring
mnemonic: An ornamented sash hanging with cloth (巾) below: a 'belt'; to 'carry' on the belt.

meaning: to lead; to guide; to conduct; to direct
mnemonic: 巳 (path) + 寸 (hand). A guiding hand showing the road: to 'lead', to guide.

meaning: to struggle; to fight; to contend; to argue
mnemonic: Two hands (爫, 彐) tugging one stick: to 'fight over', to contend, to struggle.

meaning: to transport; to move; fortune; luck; fate
mnemonic: 辶 (movement) + 云 (cloud). Things carried along like drifting clouds: to 'transport'; 'luck'.
竹 (bamboo) + 夭 (bending). Bamboo swaying as if shaking with mirth: to 'laugh', to smile.
A bird's outstretched wing in motion (simplified): to 'fly', to soar.
Simplified from 風. A sail or insect borne on moving air: the 'wind'; by extension a 'style'.

meaning: step; pace; to walk; stage (in a process)
mnemonic: Two feet (止) one after the other: a 'step', a pace, to walk.

meaning: to change; to alter; to correct; to transform
mnemonic: 己 (self) + 攵 (action). Tapping yourself to do better: to 'change', to correct.

meaning: to receive; to collect; to gather; to harvest
mnemonic: 丩 (to bind) + 攵 (action). Gathering and binding the harvest in: to 'collect', to receive.

meaning: root; basis; (measure for long things); radical
mnemonic: 木 (tree) + 艮 (stay firm). The part of the tree that holds fast underground: the 'root', a basis.

meaning: dry / to do; to work; trunk; cadre
mnemonic: A pestle or shield: as 'gān', dry/to offend; as 'gàn', the trunk, to do the work.

meaning: to make; to build; to create; to manufacture
mnemonic: 辶 (movement) + 告 (announce). Moving to bring something into being: to 'make', to build.

meaning: words; speech; to say; to talk
mnemonic: A tongue (舌) wagging above a mouth, sound coming out: 'words', speech.

meaning: to join; to unite; to ally; to link
mnemonic: 耳 (ear) + 关 (connect). Ears linked in a chain passing word along: to 'join', to unite.

meaning: to hold; to grasp; to support; to maintain
mnemonic: 扌 (hand) + 寺 (temple). A steady hand holding fast: to 'hold', to maintain.

meaning: group; to form; to organize; (a cord)
mnemonic: 纟 (silk) + 且 (stack). Weaving separate threads into one band: to 'form', a 'group'.
A figure with hairpins, originally 'mother'; now 'each, every' (every one mothered).

meaning: to aid; to cross a river; to benefit; economy
mnemonic: 氵 (water) + 齐 (even). Helping people across the water together: to 'aid'; 经济 = economy.

meaning: vehicle; car; machine; to shape on a lathe
mnemonic: A cart seen from above, axle and wheels (simplified): a 'vehicle', a car.

meaning: dear; parent; relative; intimate; in person
mnemonic: 立 (stand) + 木 (tree), simplified. Those who stand closest to you: 'dear', kin, a 'parent'.
木 (wood) + 及 (reach). The ridgepole at the very top of a frame: the 'extreme', the utmost.
Two trees (木) side by side: a 'wood', a forest.

meaning: clothes; to serve; to obey; to take (medicine)
mnemonic: 月 (body) + a hand pressing a kneeling figure into duty: to 'submit'; 'clothes' you put on.
忄 (heart) + 夬 (decisive). A heart that leaps without delay: 'fast', quick, pleased.

meaning: to handle; to manage; to do; to set up
mnemonic: Simplified from 辦. 力 (strength) flanked by dots: putting effort in to 'handle' a task.

meaning: to discuss; to comment; opinion; to deliberate
mnemonic: 讠 (speech) + 义 (righteousness). Talking out the right course: to 'discuss', an 'opinion'.
彳 (step) + 主. Stepping off toward a destination: to 'go toward'; 'past', former.
二 (two/top) over 儿 (a person). The head, the topmost and 'first' part; the unit 'yuan'.
艹 (grass) + 央 (center). The finest bloom of the plant: 'outstanding', a 'hero'; also 'English'.
An upright figure standing between heaven and earth: a 'scholar', a gentleman, a warrior.

meaning: to prove; certificate; evidence; to confirm
mnemonic: 讠 (speech) + 正 (upright). Words that set the record straight: 'proof', a 'certificate'.
辶 (movement) + 斤 (axe). Only a short walk away: 'near', close, recent.

meaning: to lose; to miss; to fail; mistake
mnemonic: A hand (手) with something slipping out of its grip: to 'lose', to let fall, to fail.

meaning: to turn; to shift; to forward / to revolve
mnemonic: 车 (wheel) + 专 (to spin). A wheel spinning round: to 'turn', to revolve, to shift.
大 (a grown man) with a hairpin (一) across the top, marking adulthood: a 'man', a husband.
亼 (gather) over 卩 (kneeling person). A figure issuing orders to those below: a 'command'.

meaning: to allow; accurate; standard; to grant
mnemonic: 冫 (water) + 隹 (bird). A bird sighting true to a target: 'accurate'; to 'grant', a standard.

meaning: cloth; to spread; to announce; to declare
mnemonic: A hand (𠂇) over 巾 (cloth). Spreading out woven 'cloth'; to 'spread', to announce.
女 (woman) + 台. Where life begins, with the mother: to 'begin', the start.
乍 (suddenly) + 心 (heart). The heart's sudden 'how? why?': the question word 怎么.
口 (mouth) + 尼 (nun). A spoken softener at the end of a question: the particle 呢.

meaning: to exist; to store; to keep; to deposit; to survive
mnemonic: 才 (sprout) + 子 (child). A young life kept and tended: to 'exist', to store, to survive.

meaning: not yet; did not; have not; (8th branch)
mnemonic: A tree (木) whose top branches are not yet grown out: 'not yet', undone.
辶 (movement) + 元 (origin). A long way from the start: 'far', distant.

meaning: to call; to shout; to be called; to order
mnemonic: 口 (mouth) + 丩 (twisting). A mouth letting out a twisting cry: to 'call', to shout.
厶 + 口 (mouth). A raised mouth-shaped stand: a 'platform', a 'stage', a desk.

meaning: single; only; sole; sheet; list; (odd number)
mnemonic: Simplified from 單. Originally a forked weapon; now 'single', a 'list', a 'form'.
景 (scene/light) + 彡 (strokes). Light casting drawn outlines: a 'shadow', an 'image', film.
Two hands holding up a vessel (目-like): an 'implement', a tool; to 'possess'.
罒 (net) + 夕. A bird-catching 'net'; to 'gather' as in a net; the surname Luo.
宀 (roof) + 子 (child). Characters 'born' and multiplying under a roof: a written 'word'.

meaning: to love; affection; to like; to be fond of
mnemonic: Simplified from 愛. A hand offering, originally wrapped around 心 (heart): to 'love'.

meaning: to hit; to strike; to attack; to break
mnemonic: Simplified from 擊. A hand bringing down a blow: to 'strike', to hit, to attack.

meaning: to flow; to spread; to circulate; stream; class
mnemonic: 氵 (water) + 㐬 (a child being born, head-down). Water rushing out: to 'flow', a stream.

meaning: to prepare; to provide; to equip; fully
mnemonic: Simplified from 備. Laying tools ready in advance: to 'prepare', to equip.
斤 (axe) over two hands (廾): holding a weapon ready: a 'soldier', troops, arms.

meaning: to link; to join; even; in succession; (surname)
mnemonic: 辶 (movement) + 车 (cart). Carts moving nose to tail in a line: to 'link', in succession.

meaning: to transfer; tune; tone / to adjust; to blend
mnemonic: 讠 (speech) + 周 (all-round). Tuning words till they harmonize: to 'adjust'; a 'tune', a tone.
氵 (water) + 罙 (to probe a cave). Water far down a cavern: 'deep', profound.
A stand with goods and a mouth (口) bargaining below: 'commerce', to 'consult'.

meaning: to calculate; to count; to regard as; to plan
mnemonic: 竹 (bamboo) + 目 (eye) + 廾 (hands). Working an abacus of bamboo rods: to 'calculate'.
斦 (axes) + 贝 (money). The solid worth pledged in pawn: 'quality', substance, nature.
囗 (enclosure) + 才, simplified. People drawn into one round circle: a 'group', a ball.

meaning: to gather; to collect; collection; market
mnemonic: 隹 (bird) over 木 (tree). Birds flocking onto one tree: to 'gather', to collect.
一 (one) over 白 (white/unit). One full count of units: a 'hundred'.

meaning: to need; to require; necessity; demand
mnemonic: 雨 (rain) + 而 (beard). Waiting under the rain for what you 'need': to require, a need.
Simplified from 價. 亻 (person) + 介. What a person sets a thing at: its 'price', value.

meaning: flower; blossom; to spend; fancy; pattern
mnemonic: 艹 (plant) + 化 (transform). The plant's part that transforms into beauty: a 'flower'.
Simplified from 黨. 尚 (esteem) over 儿. People banding under one banner: a 'party'.
Simplified from 華. A plant in full glorious bloom: 'splendid', flowery; also 'China'.
土 (earth) + 成 (to complete). Earthen ramparts raised to completion: a 'city wall', a city.

meaning: stone; rock; (a unit of dry measure)
mnemonic: 厂 (cliff) with a chunk (口) fallen below: a 'stone', a rock.
纟 (silk) + 及 (reach). Silk graded thread by thread, step by step: a 'level', a rank.

meaning: whole; complete; orderly; to put in order; exactly
mnemonic: 敕 (to order) + 正 (upright). Tapping everything into upright order: 'orderly', whole.
广 (building) + 付 (to hand over). The hall where matters are handed in: a 'government office'.

meaning: to leave; to depart; away from; without
mnemonic: Originally a bird snared in a net, struggling free: to 'leave', to part from, away from.

meaning: situation; condition; moreover; the more so
mnemonic: 冫 (water) + 兄 (elder). How things stand and compare: a 'situation'; 'moreover'.

meaning: Asia; second; inferior; next to; sub-
mnemonic: Simplified from 亞. Always 'second' to first: 'inferior', sub-; also 亚洲 (Asia).

meaning: to ask; to invite; please; to request; to treat
mnemonic: 讠 (speech) + 青 (pure/blue). Speaking a clear courteous word: 'please', to invite.
扌 (hand) + 支 (branch). What the skilled hand can branch into: a 'skill', a technique.
阝 (mound) + 祭 (sacrifice). The line where two domains meet: a 'border', between, an occasion.

meaning: appointment; agreement; about; to restrict / to weigh
mnemonic: 纟 (silk) + 勺 (ladle). A binding silk cord tying two parties: an 'agreement'; 'about'.

meaning: to show; to reveal; to indicate; to instruct
mnemonic: An altar where the gods 'reveal' signs: to 'show', to indicate. The full form of 礻.

meaning: to repeat; again; to recover; to reply; double
mnemonic: Simplified from 復/複. Retracing one's steps: to 'repeat', again, to reply, to recover.
疒 (sickness) + 丙 (third/fire). A person feverish on a sickbed: an 'illness', disease.

meaning: breath; news; interest; rest; to cease
mnemonic: 自 (nose) + 心 (heart). Breath rising from the heart through the nose: a 'breath'; to 'rest'.

meaning: to investigate; to study carefully; after all
mnemonic: 穴 (cave) + 九 (nine). Probing right to the back of the cave: to 'investigate', study deeply.
纟 (silk) + 戋 (small/slivers). A fine drawn-out silk strand: a 'thread', a line, a wire.

meaning: to seem; similar; like; to resemble
mnemonic: 亻 (person) + 以 (by means of). One person held up against another: 'similar', to 'seem'.
宀 (roof) over 㠯 (mound of seals). The hall where seals are kept: an 'official', the state.
A flame with sparks leaping off each side: 'fire'.

meaning: to break; to cut off; to judge; absolutely
mnemonic: Cutting bundled threads (㡭) with an axe (斤): to 'break', to sever, to judge decisively.
米 (rice) + 青 (pure). Rice husked down to its pure kernel: 'refined', essence, energy.

meaning: full; filled; to fill; completely; Manchu
mnemonic: 氵 (water) + 㒼 (level/even). Water filled to the very brim: 'full', complete.

meaning: to support; branch; (measure word); to pay out
mnemonic: 又 (hand) holding up 十 (a branch). A hand propping up a limb: to 'support'; a 'branch'.

meaning: to look at; to regard; to inspect; vision
mnemonic: 礻/示 (show) + 见 (to see). Turning the eyes to take in: to 'look at', to regard.

meaning: to vanish; to consume; to dispel; news
mnemonic: 氵 (water) + 肖 (to dwindle). Water dwindling away to nothing: to 'vanish', to dispel.

meaning: to exceed; to surpass; the more...; to climb over
mnemonic: 走 (to run) + 戉 (axe). Running and vaulting clear over: to 'exceed', to surpass.
Four mouths (口) around 犬 (dog) guarding vessels: a 'device', a utensil, an instrument.

meaning: to hold; to contain; to allow; appearance; face
mnemonic: 宀 (roof) + 谷 (valley). A house roomy as a valley: to 'hold', to contain; also 'appearance'.

meaning: to shine; to illuminate; according to; photo
mnemonic: 昭 (bright) + 灬 (fire). Light cast down to lighten things: to 'shine'; a 'photo'.
彡 (hair) + 页 (head). Whiskers on the face; borrowed for what one 'must' do, necessary.
A bent arm reaching round, the largest single digit: 'nine'.

meaning: to increase; to add; to expand
mnemonic: 土 (earth) + 曾 (layer upon layer). Heaping earth ever higher: to 'increase', to add.

meaning: to grind; to study; to research
mnemonic: 石 (stone) + 开 (to level). Grinding on a flat stone: to 'grind', and by extension to 'research'.
Simplified from 寫. Setting things down under a roof: to 'write'.

meaning: to call; to weigh; to praise / to fit; suitable
mnemonic: 禾 (grain) + 尔. Weighing out grain and naming the amount: to 'weigh', to 'call', to praise.

meaning: to plan; to hope for; to stand on tiptoe; enterprise
mnemonic: 人 (person) over 止 (foot). A person up on tiptoe straining to see ahead: to 'plan', to hope.
Two strokes splitting apart: 'eight' (and the root sense of dividing).
工 (work) + 力 (strength). Hard work paying off: an 'achievement', merit, result.
口 (mouth) + 马 (horse, phonetic). The spoken tag that turns a statement into a question.

meaning: to wrap; bag; package; to include; to contract
mnemonic: 勹 (wrapping arm) around 巳 (a fetus). Something enclosed and bundled: to 'wrap', a 'bag'.

meaning: slice; piece; flake; thin; (measure word); film
mnemonic: Half of 木 (a split tree-trunk): a thin 'slice', a flat piece, a flake.
A hand (又) holding a tablet (中) to record events: a chronicler, hence 'history'.

meaning: to entrust; to appoint; committee; indeed; weak
mnemonic: 禾 (grain) + 女 (woman). Bending like grain, yielding a task to another: to 'entrust'; a 'committee'.
Breath rising and trailing off; a classical particle for questions and at/in (in 在乎).

meaning: to check; to investigate; to examine; to look up
mnemonic: 木 (wood) + 旦 (dawn). Examining the rings of a log by daylight: to 'check', to investigate.
车 (cart) + 巠 (stream). A cart light enough to glide like a stream: 'light', easy, gentle.

meaning: easy; simple; to change; to exchange; (surname)
mnemonic: A lizard (or sun over clouds) that changes readily: to 'change'; hence 'easy'.
日 (sun) over 十 (a stem). The sun just risen above the horizon: 'early', morning.
A steamer with rising vapor stacked in layers: a 'former' time, 'once'; great-grand kinship.

meaning: to remove; to get rid of; except; to divide
mnemonic: 阝 (mound/steps) + 余 (surplus). Clearing the steps of what's left over: to 'remove', except.
Simplified from 農. Working the fields at first light: 'agriculture', farming.

meaning: to look for; to seek; to find; to give change
mnemonic: 扌 (hand) + 戈 (halberd). A hand searching, weapon ready: to 'look for', to seek.

meaning: to install; to dress; clothing; to pretend; to load
mnemonic: 壮 (strong) + 衣 (clothing). Putting on one's outfit and gear: to 'dress', to install, to load.

meaning: wide; broad; numerous; to spread; vast
mnemonic: A roof with one open side, a hall stretching wide: 'broad', vast.
日 (sun) + 业, simplified from 顯. Brought out into the sunlight: 'obvious', conspicuous.
口 (mouth) + 巴. A soft spoken nudge at sentence end: '...right?', 'let's...', the particle 吧.
阝 (mound) + 可. A bend in a hill; now mainly the affectionate name-prefix 阿 (阿姨, 阿明).
木 (tree) + 子 (child/fruit). The tree bearing small fruit: the 'plum'; the surname Li.

meaning: mark; sign; label; standard; to bid; prize
mnemonic: 木 (tree) + 示 (to show). A marker post showing the way: a 'mark', a sign, a standard.

meaning: to talk; to chat; to discuss; to converse
mnemonic: 讠 (speech) + 炎 (flame). Words flowing warm and lively: to 'talk', to chat, to discuss.

meaning: to eat; to consume; to suffer; to absorb
mnemonic: 口 (mouth) + 乞 (to beg). The mouth taking food in: to 'eat'.

meaning: diagram; picture; chart; to plan; to scheme
mnemonic: 囗 (border) around a sketched plan, simplified from 圖. A 'map', a diagram; to 'plan'.

meaning: to read aloud; to miss; to think of; idea; to study
mnemonic: 今 (now) + 心 (heart). Holding something present in the heart: to 'miss', to read aloud, a thought.
A roofed shape, an old loan for the number: 'six'.

meaning: to lead; to draw; to guide; to attract; to quote
mnemonic: 弓 (bow) + 丨 (drawn string). Pulling the bowstring back: to 'draw', to lead, to attract.

meaning: to experience; calendar; to pass through; all
mnemonic: Simplified from 歷/曆. Passing step by step through time: to 'experience'; a 'calendar'.

meaning: head; chief; first; (measure word for poems/songs)
mnemonic: A head with hair and an eye: the 'head', the 'first', the chief.

meaning: medicine; doctor; to cure; to treat; medical
mnemonic: Simplified from 醫. An arrow (矢) in a case being treated: 'medicine', a doctor, to cure.
尸 (body) + 句. A confined space marked off: an 'office', a bureau; a 'situation', a round.

meaning: to dash; sudden; abrupt; to stick out; to break through
mnemonic: 穴 (cave) + 犬 (dog). A dog bursting suddenly out of its den: 'sudden', to 'dash out'.

meaning: special; expert; for a specific purpose; focused
mnemonic: Simplified from 專. A hand turning a single spindle, focused on one thing: 'special', expert.

meaning: fee; expense; to cost; to spend; wasteful
mnemonic: 弗 (not) + 贝 (money). Money slipping away from you: a 'fee', an expense, to spend.

meaning: number; mark; name; size; day of the month
mnemonic: Simplified from 號. A mouth (口) crying out to label or call: a 'number', a name, a sign.

meaning: to use up; to exhaust; to the utmost / as much as
mnemonic: Simplified from 盡. A hand wiping a vessel clean to the last: to 'use up', to exhaust.
口 (mouth) + 力 (strength). Setting one apart from the rest with effort: 'another', separate.
A field densely planted, edge to edge: 'all-round', complete; a full 'cycle', a 'week'.
车 (cart) + 交 (to cross). Setting carts side by side to match them: to 'compare', comparatively.

meaning: to pour; to concentrate; to note; annotation
mnemonic: 氵 (water) + 主 (master/lamp). Pouring water steadily onto one spot: to 'concentrate', to note.

meaning: language; speech; dialect; to speak; saying
mnemonic: 讠 (speech) + 吾 (I/me). Putting my own words into form: 'language', speech.
Simplified from 僅. 亻 (person) + 又. A person with barely a hand's worth: 'only', merely.

meaning: to test; to examine; to check; to verify; to study
mnemonic: An elder (耂) bent over, probing and questioning: to 'test', to examine.

meaning: to fall; to drop; to decline / to leave behind
mnemonic: 艹 (plant) + 洛 (water). Leaves drifting down onto water: to 'fall', to drop, to decline.
Fresh shoots (生) over a well (丹): the color of new growth: 'green/blue', and 'youth'.

meaning: to follow; to comply with; along with; (surname)
mnemonic: 辶 (movement) + 阝 (mound) + 有. Moving along behind another: to 'follow', to comply.

meaning: to choose; to pick; to select; to elect; selection
mnemonic: 辶 (movement) + 先 (first). Stepping forward to pick the best: to 'choose', to elect.

meaning: to arrange; to line up; row; rank; series; (measure word)
mnemonic: 歹 (bones) + 刂 (knife). Cutting and laying pieces out in order: to 'arrange', a 'row', a series.
